gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the bounded quality-delta validation with no findings.
what_changed: Validated V1 comparison quality deltas are bounded finite numeric rate differences.
Added release-evidence regression coverage for out-of-bounds exact_match_delta and answer_found_delta values.
why: Strict V1 release evidence should reject impossible quality deltas when comparing cache reuse against no-cache prefill.
